summary.product: Digital Call Board — a web app replacing the physical backstage call board for theater productions
summary.stack: Next.js 14+ App Router, TypeScript strict, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL 16, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, NextAuth.js, Nodemailer (SMTP), Supabase (prod DB + Storage + Realtime), Vercel (prod hosting), Docker (dev only)
summary.theme: Theater backstage aesthetic — warm dark wood, cork boards, amber work lights, Playfair Display serif headings, paper-pinned bulletin posts. NOT a generic SaaS app.

roles.role: Creates theaters/productions, manages schedule, manages members, full admin
Elevated from Cast by Director. Can post, chat with anyone, view conflicts. Cannot delete production or manage other staff.
Joins via invite link. Views bulletin/schedule, submits conflicts once, chats with director/staff only. Cannot message other cast.

summary.invite-model: Single invite link per production. Everyone joins as Cast. Director promotes to Staff.

env-vars.note: SMTP vars required for transactional email (see SPEC-007 Section 4.2)

table.name: users
table.columns: id, email, name, password_hash, google_id, email_verified, avatar_url, age_range, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at

table.name: invite_tokens
table.columns: id, production_id, token, expires_at(30d), max_uses(100), use_count, created_at

table.name: theaters
table.columns: id, owner_id, name(200), city(100), state(100), created_at

table.name: productions
table.columns: id, theater_id, name(200), estimated_cast_size, first_rehearsal, opening_night, closing_night, is_archived, archived_at, created_at, updated_at

table.name: rehearsal_dates
table.columns: id, production_id, date, start_time, end_time, type(regular|tech|dress|performance), note(1000), is_cancelled, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at

table.name: bulletin_posts
table.columns: id, production_id, author_id, title(200), body(10000/markdown), is_pinned, created_at, updated_at

table.name: cast_profiles
table.columns: id, production_id, user_id, display_name(200), phone(20), role_character(200), headshot_url, created_at, updated_at

table.name: cast_conflicts
table.columns: id, production_id, user_id, rehearsal_date_id, reason(500), submitted_at

table.name: messages
table.columns: id, conversation_id, sender_id, body(2000), is_read, is_deleted, created_at

spec.title: Product Overview and User Roles
spec.success-metric: An AI reading only this spec can correctly answer "who can do what" for any action in the system without ambiguity

immutable.constraint: Exactly 3 roles: director, staff, cast
Single invite link per production — no per-role links
Age gate at 13+ (COPPA)
90-day PII deletion after production archive
Cast cannot message cast

spec.non-goals: Multi-tenant SaaS, native mobile apps, audience features, payments, parent accounts, auto-moderation

spec.title: Authentication and Authorization
spec.success-metric: No unauthenticated request accesses protected data. No user performs actions their role forbids. No response reveals email existence.

immutable.constraint: bcrypt cost factor 12
Session tokens 256-bit (32 bytes hex)
Invite tokens min 32 chars, 30-day expiry, max 100 uses
Rate limit 5/min/IP login, lockout after 10 failed in 15min
CSRF on all POST/PUT/DELETE
Security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) on all responses

spec.non-goals: Magic link auth, SMS auth, non-Google social login, 2FA/MFA, SSO/SAML, admin panel

spec.title: Director Flow
spec.success-metric: Identical wizard inputs produce byte-identical schedule output. Director manages full production lifecycle from dashboard.

immutable.constraint: first_rehearsal <= opening_night <= closing_night (DB CHECK)
All text fields have max-length DB CHECK constraints
Markdown sanitized server-side before storage
Soft-delete default for rehearsal dates
Tech week overrides day filter; blocked dates override tech week

spec.non-goals: Drag-and-drop schedule, calendar sync, email notifications, multi-production view, recurring templates

spec.title: Cast Flow
spec.success-metric: Cast completes onboarding in under 3 minutes. Conflicts submitted exactly once unless Director resets.

immutable.constraint: Conflicts immutable after submission — no edit endpoint
conflict_submissions UNIQUE(production_id, user_id) is authoritative guard
JPEG/PNG only via magic bytes, 5MB max, EXIF stripped, UUID filenames
Conflict reasons max 500 chars (DB CHECK)

spec.non-goals: Cast-to-cast messaging, cast editing schedule, cast editing conflicts, cast seeing others' conflicts, self-service conflict reset, video/audio uploads

spec.title: Chat System
spec.success-metric: Cast can NEVER see or message another cast member, even via direct API. Messages deliver in under 2 seconds via WebSocket.

immutable.constraint: Cast-to-cast blocked at API level, not just UI (403)
Messages max 2000 chars (DB CHECK)
WebSocket validates session on upgrade + every 5 min (4401 close code)
Rate limit 30 messages/min/user
Director can delete any message; self-delete within exactly 5 minutes

spec.non-goals: Group chats, file sharing, read receipts, typing indicators, message search, chat export, E2E encryption, automated filtering

spec.title: Schedule and Conflict Management
spec.success-metric: Identical wizard inputs produce byte-identical schedule. Director sees per-date conflict counts in one click.

immutable.constraint: Schedule generation is a pure function of inputs
Conflict submission all-or-nothing in single transaction
conflict_submissions UNIQUE constraint is the authority
Soft-delete does NOT cascade-delete conflicts
start_time < end_time (DB CHECK)

spec.non-goals: Drag-and-drop calendar, recurring templates, calendar export, auto-conflict resolution, cast self-service editing, partial submission

spec.title: Infrastructure and Deployment
spec.success-metric: Dev: docker compose up db + npm run dev starts local env. Prod: Supabase + Vercel deployment running. Push to main auto-deploys within 2 minutes.

immutable.constraint: .env never committed to git
NEXTAUTH_SECRET min 32 bytes random
Database queries use Drizzle ORM only — no supabase-js for data access
Supabase service role key never exposed to client
STORAGE_PROVIDER and NEXT_PUBLIC_REALTIME_PROVIDER env vars control dev/prod backends

spec.non-goals: Kubernetes, horizontal scaling, Redis, Supabase JS client for database queries

spec.title: TDD Strategy and Test Plan
spec.success-metric: No PR merges with failing tests. Every scenario ID has a test function. CI completes in under 5 minutes.

immutable.constraint: TDD cycle: RED then GREEN then REFACTOR — never skip RED
Integration tests use real PostgreSQL, not mocks
Security tests run in every CI pipeline
Test DB is callboard_test (separate from dev/prod)
Each test suite wraps in transaction that rolls back

spec.non-goals: E2E browser tests in v1, perf testing, visual regression, 100% coverage everywhere, manual QA docs

spec.title: Frontend Architecture and Theater Design System
spec.success-metric: User feels backstage at a theater, not using generic SaaS. Fully usable at 375px. Every element keyboard-navigable.

immutable.constraint: Tailwind CSS only — no CSS-in-JS
shadcn/ui for all base components
Playfair Display serif headings, Libre Franklin body
Warm HSL hue 25-40 for backgrounds — no cold blue/gray
No light mode, no image textures (CSS only)
4.5:1 contrast, 44x44px touch targets

spec.non-goals: Light mode, CSS-in-JS, custom component library, animations, image textures, PWA, offline mode, native app

spec.title: Pages and Screens
spec.success-metric: AI builder implements every page with correct layout, nav, access control, and behavior without clarifying questions.

immutable.constraint: 19 routes total
Cast sees only Bulletin Board + Chat nav
Dashboard shows: quick stats, upcoming schedule, recent posts, invite link
Bulletin board default tab is Posters
Conflict submission: 2 states only (not submitted / submitted read-only)
Schedule wizard: exactly 7 steps
Account deletion requires re-authentication

spec.non-goals: Pixel-perfect mockups, animation specs, micro-copy, print styles, PDF export, deep-linking to posts

task.name: Setting up project from scratch
task.specs: SPEC-007:Tech Stack, SPEC-007:Development Environment, SPEC-007:Environment Variables, SPEC-007:.gitignore, SPEC-009:Project Structure

task.name: Implementing auth (login/register/OAuth)
task.specs: SPEC-002:Auth Flows, SPEC-002:Database Schema, SPEC-001:Data Privacy (age gate)

task.name: Implementing invite link join
task.specs: SPEC-002:Invite Link Flow, SPEC-004:Cast Onboarding Flow

task.name: Implementing RBAC middleware
task.specs: SPEC-002:Permission Matrix, SPEC-002:Middleware, SPEC-002:Error Format, SPEC-003:Authorization Rules

task.name: Implementing schedule generator
task.specs: SPEC-003:Schedule Builder Wizard, SPEC-006:Schedule Generation Algorithm, SPEC-006:Rehearsal Date Types

task.name: Implementing conflict submission
task.specs: SPEC-004:Conflict Submission, SPEC-004:Race Condition, SPEC-006:Conflict Management

task.name: Implementing bulletin board
task.specs: SPEC-003:Bulletin Board, SPEC-004:Bulletin Board Cast View, SPEC-010:Bulletin Board Page

task.name: Implementing chat
task.specs: SPEC-005:Chat Architecture, SPEC-005:WebSocket Auth, SPEC-005:Moderation, SPEC-005:Database Schema, SPEC-005:Starting a New Conversation, SPEC-005:Read Status

task.name: Implementing the frontend theme
task.specs: SPEC-009:Theater Design System, SPEC-009:Color Palette, SPEC-009:Typography, SPEC-009:Textures

task.name: Implementing any page
task.specs: SPEC-010:(specific page section), SPEC-009:Navigation Structure, SPEC-009:Loading/Empty States

task.name: Writing tests
task.specs: SPEC-008:Test Organization, SPEC-008:Test-to-Spec Mapping, (relevant spec):Test Scenarios

task.name: Database migrations
task.specs: SPEC-002:Database Schema, SPEC-003:Database Schema, SPEC-004:Database Schema, SPEC-005:Database Schema

task.name: Director roster management
task.specs: SPEC-003:Member Roster, SPEC-003:Demotion Side Effects, SPEC-004:Director Conflict Reset, SPEC-001:Staff Elevation Model

task.name: Production archival
task.specs: SPEC-003:Production Archival, SPEC-001:Data Privacy (90-day deletion), SPEC-007:Database Management

phases.phase: Supabase project, Vercel project, local dev DB, env config
Google OAuth + email/password, sessions, middleware, email delivery
